allow: PowerShell($py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($py\) { "python: " + $py.Source; \(python --version\) } else { "NO python" }; $node = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($node\) { "node: " + $node.Source; \(node --version\) } else { "NO node" })
